name: Ardmore Park
description: Come play pickleball at Ardmore Park in Ardmore, AL! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Athens Recreational Center
description: Athens Recreational Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athens, AL. There are 10 concrete, asphalt, and hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water.

name: Athens Recreation and Fitness
description: Athens Recreation and Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bonnie Doone, AL. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Athens State University
description: Up to 4 courts are available. Setup on as-needed basis.

name: Big Spring Park
description: Big Spring Park is a place to play pickleball in Athens, AL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The court lines are permanent. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Canebrake Country Club
description: Canebrake Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Athens, AL. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
fees: Members only — No cost if playing with a resident

name: Swan Creek Park
description: Swan Creek Park is a place to play pickleball in Athens, AL. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The Barn - North Alabama Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at The Barn - North Alabama Pickleball in Athens, AL! There are 2 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.
